summary: File Manager and Souvenir Suppliers features fully tested. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - both pages load correctly with all features working.

issues: WebSocket connection warnings in console (1006 errors) but doesn't affect functionality

souvenir_suppliers.test_01_get_souvenir_suppliers_endpoint: PASS - Returns suppliers list with counts (all, active, inactive)
souvenir_suppliers.test_02_create_souvenir_supplier: PASS - Creates supplier with SUP-YYYYMMDD-NNN format ID
souvenir_suppliers.test_03_get_single_supplier: PASS - Returns single supplier by ID
souvenir_suppliers.test_04_search_suppliers_by_company_name: PASS - Search by company name works
souvenir_suppliers.test_05_search_suppliers_by_phone: PASS - Search by phone number works
souvenir_suppliers.test_06_filter_suppliers_by_status_activ: PASS - Filter by active status works
souvenir_suppliers.test_07_update_supplier: PASS - Update supplier with persistence verification
souvenir_suppliers.test_08_delete_supplier_soft_delete: PASS - Soft delete sets status to inactive
souvenir_suppliers.test_09_filter_suppliers_by_status_inact: PASS - Filter by inactive status works

file_manager.test_10_get_files_endpoint: PASS - Returns files list with stats (total, local, supabase, images, documents)
file_manager.test_15_search_files: PASS - Search files by name/folder works
file_manager.test_16_file_data_structure: PASS - File data contains all required fields

file_manager.page_loads: PASS - FILE MANAGER title visible, stats cards displayed
file_manager.statistics: PASS - Shows Total Files, Local Files, Cloud Files, Images, Documents, Total Size
file_manager.source_filter: PASS - Local Storage/Cloud Storage filter works
file_manager.search: PASS - Search by file name or folder works
file_manager.files_table: PASS - Shows Preview, File Name, Folder, Type, Size, Source, Modified, Actions

souvenir_suppliers.page_loads: PASS - SOUVENIR SUPPLIER CONTACTS title visible
souvenir_suppliers.filter_tabs: PASS - All/Active/Inactive tabs with counts work
souvenir_suppliers.search: PASS - Search by company, contact, phone, email, products works
souvenir_suppliers.add_supplier_modal: PASS - Opens with all form fields
souvenir_suppliers.view_supplier_modal: PASS - Shows Company Information, Contact Details, Address, Products Supplied
souvenir_suppliers.edit_supplier_modal: PASS - Pre-populates fields, Update Supplier button works
souvenir_suppliers.delete_confirmation: PASS - Shows confirmation with Yes, Delete and Cancel buttons
souvenir_suppliers.suppliers_table: PASS - Shows Supplier ID, Company Name, Contact Person, Phone, Email, Status, Actions

navigation.sidebar_links: PASS - Settings > Souvenir Suppliers and Settings > File Manager links work

file_manager.file_statistics: 6 stat cards: Total Files, Local Files, Cloud Files, Images, Documents, Total Size
file_manager.file_sources: Local storage (/app/backend/uploads/) and Supabase cloud storage
file_manager.file_listing: Table with preview, name, folder (colored tags), type, size, source, modified date, actions
file_manager.search: Search by file name or folder name
file_manager.folders_supported: designs, products, images, enquiries, mockups, fabrics, souvenirs, boutique, pod-designs, pod-mockups, bulk-products, pod-products

souvenir_suppliers.crud_operations: Create, Read, Update, Delete (soft delete to inactive)
souvenir_suppliers.search_fields: Company name, contact person, phone, email, products supplied
souvenir_suppliers.form_fields: Company Name*, Phone Number*, Contact Person, WhatsApp, Email, Address, City, State, Country, Status, Products Supplied, Notes
souvenir_suppliers.modals: Add New Supplier, View Supplier Details, Edit Supplier, Delete Confirmation

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket reconnection attempts generate console warnings but don't affect functionality - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: Test suppliers created with TEST_ prefix and Test Playwright prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: File Manager and Souvenir Suppliers features are fully implemented and tested. File Manager shows files from local uploads and Supabase cloud storage. Souvenir Suppliers uses 'souvenir_suppliers' MongoDB collection (separate from 'suppliers'). Supplier IDs use SUP-YYYYMMDD-NNN format. All CRUD operations working. Navigation is under Settings sidebar menu.
